escalations.description: Iran head of state change. Our update records Khamenei as killed/VACANT. Existing data shows an Interim Leadership Council (Pezeshkian, Mohseni-Eje'i, Arafi). The new value conflicts with the existing interim council designation.
escalations.proposed_value: VACANT (Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei killed Feb 28)
escalations.recommended_action: ACCEPT_WITH_DOWNGRADE — The Khamenei death is beyond doubt (10+ sources). However, existing data already captures interim council. Recommend: keep interim council as head_of_state (since they are functioning) but update notes to reflect Khamenei killed and succession status uncertain. Confidence downgrade from 0.98 to 0.90 on the political stability implications.
